mapper.insert: insert into orders(order_no, user_id, status, total_amount, pay_amount, discount_amount, coupon_claim_id, create_time, pay_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{couponClaimId}, #{createTime}, #{payTime})

insert into order_item(order_id, goods_id, sku_id, title, pic, price, quantity, total_amount, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{goodsId}, #{skuId}, #{title}, #{pic}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, order_no, user_id, status, total_amount, pay_amount, coupon_claim_id, discount_amount, create_time, pay_time, update_time from orders where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select id, order_id, goods_id, sku_id, title, pic, price, quantity, total_amount, create_time from order_item where order_id = #{orderId} order by id asc
mapper.update: update orders set status = 1, pay_time = current_timestamp, update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 0
update orders set coupon_claim_id = #{couponClaimId}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select g.merchant_id as merchantId, sum(oi.total_amount) as amount from order_item oi inner join goods g on g.id = oi.goods_id where oi.order_id = #{orderId} group by g.merchant_id

select o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus, o.create_time as orderCreateTime, o.pay_time as payTime, oi.goods_id as goodsId, oi.sku_id as skuId, oi.title as title, oi.pic as pic, oi.price as price, oi.quantity as quantity, oi.total_amount as totalAmount from orders o inner join order_item oi on oi.order_id = o.id inner join goods g on g.id = oi.goods_id where o.user_id = #{userId} and g.merchant_id = #{merchantId} order by o.id desc, oi.id asc
